actions.name: Ram
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +2, reach 5 ft. Hit: 1 Bludgeoning damage, or 2 (1d4) Bludgeoning damage if the goat moved 20+ feet straight toward the target immediately before the hit.

tactical_info.combat_role: Charger - Basic farm animal with charging ability
tactical_info.positioning: Uses climb ability and charge for enhanced damage
tactical_info.weaknesses: Very low HP and AC, minimal combat capability
tactical_info.synergies: Works well with other herd animals, basic mount potential
